name: Increase/Decrease/Copy
output: For each test case, print a single integer — the minimum number of operations (possibly zero) required to transform the array $a$ into the array $b$.
note: In the first example, you can transform $a$ into $b$ as follows: $[2] \rightarrow [2, 2] \rightarrow [1, 2] \rightarrow [1, 3]$.
